name: cities2-mcp
description: Cities: Skylines II wiki, encyclopedia, and mod workflow tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: CS2 wiki, encyclopedia, and mod workflows
interface.longDescription: Cities2 MCP and Modding Toolkit gives Codex local access to the bundled Cities: Skylines II Wiki corpus and curated research reports, the user's locally extracted in-game encyclopedia when available, five agent skills, and mod project workflow tools for trusted workspaces.
defaultPrompt: What changed in the latest Cities: Skylines II patch?
Scaffold a Cities: Skylines II UI mod.
Build and package this Cities: Skylines II mod.
